steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage acknowledges Kapteyn b as a promising candidate but immediately flags that it is 13 light years away — far too distant to reach anytime soon. Because of this obstacle, focus must shift to something closer and reachable. The transition word must convey substitution: we can't go there, so we turn to something else instead.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "Likewise,": Signals similarity between two things, not a pivot caused by an obstacle. ✗
  • "For example,": Introduces an illustration of a point already made, not a substitution. ✗
  • "Next,": Signals sequence in a list or process, not a logical redirection due to an obstacle. ✗
  • "Instead,": Captures the substitution logic exactly — because Kapteyn b is unreachably far, attention turns to planets within our solar system instead. ✓
That matches the correct answer — D is correct.
